text:
CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: The CCW constructs the plan characteristics file from information submitted by plan sponsors to 
CMS’s Health Plan Management System (HPMS). 

A listing of the SSA state and county codes can be found on the US Census website; also, CMS has 
core-based statistical area (CBSA) crosswalk files available on their website, which include state and 
county SSA codes.
